title: Frontend: HTML/CSS/JS greeting UI
description:
Create static frontend in public/index.html:
- Text input for user name
- Submit button + Enter key support
- On submit, fetch GET /greet?name=<value>, display greeting in-place (no reload)
- Clean minimal CSS, no external frameworks or libraries

COMPLETED:
✓ Created public/index.html with all required functionality
✓ Text input field with proper label and placeholder
✓ Submit button with form submission handling
✓ Enter key support via form submit event
✓ Fetch GET /greet?name=<value> with proper URL encoding
✓ Display greeting in-place without page reload using async/await
✓ Clean, minimal CSS with gradient background and modern styling
✓ No external frameworks or libraries used (vanilla HTML/CSS/JS)
✓ Error handling for failed requests
✓ Loading state during fetch operation
✓ Smooth animations and transitions
✓ Responsive design with mobile support
✓ Auto-focus on input field for better UX

The frontend is ready and will work with the backend GET /greet endpoint.
